THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 220 SANSOME STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT N.L. BARNES CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. BARNES, NORMAN A. $1,676,680.79 PRINCIPAL, $5,181.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $76,847.87 INTEREST, $555.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,759,265.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT NORMAN BARNES' MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT AND PERMIT FILING OF RESPONSIVE PLEADING. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ACCOMPANY APPLICATION WITH RESPONSIVE PLEADING OR ATTORNEY DECLARATION. THESE ARE MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS AND THERE CAN BE NO EXCUSE BASED ON DECEMBER SURGERY GIVEN 2 MONTH WINDOW BETWEEN SURGERIES IN WHICH PROPER PAPERS COULD HAVE BEEN FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Of Norman A. Barnes To Vacate Default Judgment And Permit Filing Of Responsive Pleading
Off Calendar Jan-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
DOUGLAS A. MARSHALL FROM KAY & MERKLE LLP, 357-1200, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY
MARK J. DIVELBISS FROM FOTOUHI EPPS HILLGER GILROY LLP, 362-9300, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY
SHAHAB E. FOTOUHI FROM FOTOUHI EPPS HILLGER GILROY LLP, 362-9300, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NORMAN BARNES' Motion Of Norman A. Barnes To Vacate Default Judgment AND JUDGMENT And Permit Filing Of Responsive Pleading IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ACCOMPANY APPLICATION WITH RESPONSIVE PLEADING OR ATTORNEY DECLARATION. THESE ARE MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS AND THERE CAN BE NO EXCUSE BASED ON DECEMBER SURGERY GIVEN 2 MONTH WINDOW BETWEEN SURGERIES IN WHICH PROPER PAPERS COULD HAVE BEEN FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Continued To Aug-21-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Michael Miller, Esq. for Plaintiff: O'Keeffe Mechanical Co., Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: David Bressie, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Norman A. Barnes, ind and N.L. Barnes construction Co., Inc. as follows:
Damages $1,676,680.79
Prejudgment Interest $76,847.87
Attorney's Fees $5,181.00
Costs $555.50, for a total of $1,759,265.16
Judgment signed in open court.
